directive.title: Neon DB connection and basic table creation

auditor.summary: The generated code is incomplete and fails to meet the core requirements of the directive. Two critical files (lib/db.ts and lib/schema.sql) were not created, meaning there is no actual database connection, no schema, and no working implementation. The package.json has BUILDABILITY issues with incorrect dependencies (crypto npm package instead of Node.js built-in, non-existent @types/crypto, and @neondatabase/serverless not in the allowed packages list). While the TypeScript types and configuration files show good architectural thinking, the lack of executable code means this build cannot be deployed or audited as functional. The code must be regenerated with all required files and proper dependency management before it can pass.

top_issues.description: Required file not created. The build spec explicitly requires lib/db.ts for database connection, but it was not generated. This is the core file for the entire directive.
Required file not created. The build spec requires lib/schema.sql for database schema definition with DECIMAL(15,2) fields, foreign keys, indexes, and audit log table.

BUILDABILITY: Added @neondatabase/serverless dependency but it is NOT in the installed packages list. The installed packages list includes @supabase/supabase-js but not @neondatabase/serverless. This import will fail.
